title: S.A.M Spell
description: Defines a custom spell. S.A.M's spell loader registers it into its runtime spell registry at a reserved id (>=2000) so it can be referenced by name ('namespace:spell'). NOTE: this version REGISTERS and validates the spell metadata and lets sam_grant_spell reference it; building the in-engine spell object and the actual CASTING behavior (projectile, damage, on-hit effects) is delivered in a later update. Every 'payload'/'projectile_type'/'damage_*'/'on_hit_*' field below is parsed and stored now but does not yet cast.

$schema.description: Optional. URL of this JSON Schema, so editors give autocomplete + validation as you type. Ignored by S.A.M itself.

id.description: Unique spell id in 'namespace:spell' form (e.g. 'darkmage:shadow_bolt'). S.A.M assigns the runtime numeric spell id (>=2000) automatically.

name.description: Display name of the spell (e.g. 'Shadow Bolt').

description.description: Short flavor/description text shown for the spell.

mana_cost.description: Mana required to cast the spell.

projectile_type.description: How the spell is delivered. 'missile' = a single bolt (Barony PROPULSION_MISSILE / spell_element_missile root). 'missile_trio' = a 3-way spread (PROPULSION_MISSILE_TRIO / spell_element_trio). 'none' = a non-projectile/self spell. (Parsed now; drives casting in a later update.)

payload.description: The spell's effect payload — maps 1:1 to a real Barony spell element (e.g. 'fire' -> spell_element_fireball, 'force' -> spell_element_forcebolt, 'charm_monster' -> spell_element_charm, 'magic_missile' -> spell_element_magicmissile). Determines the bolt's on-hit behavior. (Parsed now; drives casting in a later update.)

damage_min.description: Minimum damage the spell deals. (Parsed now; applied when casting lands in a later update.)

damage_max.description: Maximum damage the spell deals. (Parsed now; applied when casting lands in a later update.)

range.description: Effective range / projectile travel distance. (Parsed now; applied in a later update.)

speed.description: Projectile speed. (Parsed now; applied in a later update.)

on_hit_effect.description: Optional. Status effect (an EFF_ effect name from stat.hpp, e.g. 'EFF_POISONED') applied to a struck target. (Parsed now; applied in a later update.)

on_hit_duration.description: Optional. Duration in game ticks (50/sec) of on_hit_effect. (Parsed now; applied in a later update.)

on_hit_chance.description: Optional. Percent chance (0-100) that on_hit_effect triggers on a hit. (Parsed now; applied in a later update.)

icon.description: Optional. Path (relative to the mod folder) to a PNG spell icon, e.g. 'spells/shadow_bolt.png'. (Parsed now; drawn when the spell UI lands in a later update.)

starting_spell.description: Optional. Hint that this spell is intended as a class starting spell. Actual granting is driven by a class's 'starting_spells' array (which may list this spell's 'namespace:spell' id).

examples.name: Shadow Bolt
examples.description: A bolt of condensed shadow that saps the life from its target.
